verdict.answer_first: A wins: sentence 1 says “Go with Tailwind for this case”; B also starts with “I’d recommend Tailwind” but immediately dilutes with “real trade-offs.”
verdict.decisiveness: A wins: it gives one default and warns “don’t mix both as your primary approach”; B adds “vanilla-extract” and asks follow-up, creating extra paths.
verdict.fabrication: none; both make general claims, but neither gives fake numeric evidence. B’s “very popular” is unverified but not a fabricated number.
verdict.actionability: A wins: clearer prescription: Tailwind, accept long classNames, extract components, add prettier-plugin-tailwindcss, don’t mix systems.
